Overrides.Override: 10% reduced Attributes 40% increased Global Defences Limited to 1 Runegraft of the Fortress
Enemies Poisoned by you have 10% of Physical Damage they deal converted to Chaos Limited to 1 Runegraft of Rotblood

Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE Bino's Kitchen Knife Slaughter Knife Unique ID: 36bf3c07a697a2ad66318b2d91a17c1c357dbb24cd188dbcead6e9c10312ae2f Item Level: 85 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-G-B LevelReq: 58 Implicits: 3 {crafted}Quality does not increase Physical Damage {crafted}+0.1 metres to Weapon Range per 10% Quality 30% increased Global Critical Strike Chance Adds 169 to 262 Physical Damage 49% increased Critical Strike Chance +18% to Global Critical Strike Multiplier +18% to Chaos Resistance On Killing a Poisoned Enemy, Enemies within 3 metres are Poisoned, and you and Allies Regenerate 400 Life per second for the Poison's duration if within 3 metres Corrupted
